system.description:
Discipline: Neigong
Skill: Command against Wits
Type: Normal
Qi: 2

You focus your mind and release a powerful cloud of golden energy that fumes from your body and engulfs your foes, causing them to feel your state of inebriation. User spreads an unseen cloud out from their body (10 feet per Qi Rank) through force of will. Make a Command Skill roll against the Wits of all targets in affected area. Those affected suffer -1d10 to all Skills and Defenses due to drunkenness (except Resolve and Hardiness which increase by 1) for 10 minutes per Rank of Neigong. This affects everyone in the area, even allies. Total success changes duration from 10 minutes to 1 hour. This Technique only affects targets 2 Qi Ranks or more lower than you. Requirement: The user must be drunk to use this Technique. Cathartic: Affected targets immediately pass out.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.targetEffects: Drunk for 10 minutes per Rank of Neigong: -1d10 to Skills and Defenses, except Resolve and Hardiness increase by 1
system.totalSuccessTargetEffects: Drunk for 1 hour per Rank of Neigong: -1d10 to Skills and Defenses, except Resolve and Hardiness increase by 1
system.targetEffectsNote: Area affects allies too and only affects targets 2 Qi Ranks or more lower than the user.
system.requirementNotes: The user must be drunk to use this Technique.
